entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop studied for its sensitivity to water stress during seed filling

entities.name: DESI CHICKPEA
entities.description: A small-seeded genotype of chickpea

entities.name: KABULI CHICKPEA
entities.description: A large-seeded genotype of chickpea

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: Lack of water during the reproductive phase and seed filling that negatively impacts yield and seed reserves

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of seed produced per plant

entities.name: SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the seeds produced

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the seeds

entities.name: NUMBER OF PODS
entities.description: The count of single- and double-seeded pods per plant

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass

entities.name: STARCH CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of starch accumulated in the seeds

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of protein accumulated in the seeds

entities.name: SOLUBLE SUGARS
entities.description: The concentration of soluble sugars in the seeds

entities.name: FAT CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of lipids in the seeds

entities.name: FIBER CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of fiber in the seeds

entities.name: ALBUMINS
entities.description: A fraction of seed proteins

entities.name: GLOBULINS
entities.description: A fraction of seed proteins

entities.name: GLUTELINS
entities.description: A fraction of seed proteins

entities.name: PROLAMINS
entities.description: A fraction of seed proteins

entities.name: AMINO ACIDS
entities.description: Organic compounds including phenylalanine, tyrosine, tryptophan, valine, alanine, and histidine

entities.name: MINERALS
entities.description: Essential elements including Calcium (Ca), Phosphorus (P), and Iron (Fe)

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL
entities.description: The green pigment in leaves used for photosynthesis

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The process of converting light energy to chemical energy in leaves

entities.name: VEGETATIVE DRY MATTER
entities.description: The dry mass of the non-reproductive parts of the plant

entities.name: WATER POTENTIAL
entities.description: A measure of the water energy status of the plant leaves

entities.name: ELECTROLYTE LEAKAGE
entities.description: A method used to evaluate stress injury in leaves

entities.name: SUCROSE SYNTHASE
entities.description: An enzyme involved in sucrose metabolism in seeds

entities.name: INVERTASE
entities.description: An enzyme that catalyzes the hydrolysis of sucrose

entities.name: SOLUBLE STARCH SYNTHASE
entities.description: An enzyme involved in the synthesis of starch

entities.name: SEED FILLING
entities.description: The stage of seed development where reserves are accumulated

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE PHASE
entities.description: The phase of plant growth involving flowering and seed production

entities.name: SEED DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of seed growth and maturation
